summary: The test suite covers core functionality well (glob matching, rule application, priority ordering, config loading) but has significant gaps: missing edge cases in glob patterns (? wildcard entirely untested, patterns like `src/**` or `**/docs/**/file.md` untested), no null/empty input validation, incomplete error-handling coverage (missing validation for rule fields, empty labels arrays, invalid priorities), and incomplete integration testing—test-harness.ps1 references fixtures directory that isn't provided in the submission, making act-based end-to-end testing unverifiable. Pester tests use good structure but lack rigor in boundary conditions (unicode, special chars, very long paths). The GitHub Actions workflow tests verify structure via regex (fragile) and reference output markers but don't validate marker behavior in actual execution. No test fixtures provided despite test-harness.ps1 depending on them.
